data.title: September Inflation Hotter Than Expected, Jobless Claims Spike The Most In Over A Year, Clouding Fed's Interest Rate Outlook
data.description: US inflation rate declines for 6th month, while jobless claims increase. Fed may cut interest rate in Nov. Core inflation unexpectedly rises.
